params.name: Rainbow Dump
params.description: This substance with a dazzling rainbow luster contains the essence and strong life force of some unknown creature. According to the sample analysis, its rainbow luster comes from a trace substance that exists only in the cores of rare divine beasts, which is vital to their living!
